subject: [PATCH 10/14] mm/pagemap: add PAGE_IS_ACCESSED for RWP tracking

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: The patch author provided a detailed explanation of the problem and proposed solution. They clarified that the existing PAGEMAP_SCAN implementation reports both write-protected and RWP-protected pages using the same bit, which is being split into two distinct signals.

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a new pagemap category, PAGE_IS_ACCESSED, to track read-write protection (RWP) in userfaultfd. The existing PAGEMAP_SCAN implementation reports both write-protected and RWP-protected pages using the same bit, which is being split into two distinct signals. This change aims to provide a more accurate representation of page state for UAPI users.
